title: pittosporum hosmeri
intro: Pittosporum hosmeri, also known as Kawa Kawa or Kawakawa, is a small evergreen tree native to the Pacific Islands, particularly in New Zealand and Australia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Kawa Kawa include reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. In herbal preparations, Kawa Kawa is often used as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and rheumatism.
